description: Historically calibrated correlation matrix for Asia-Pacific macro stress transmission
source: Calibrated from historical conflict and supply shock episodes 2000 to 2024

notes.hormuz_disruption_days: Primary stochastic variable. Drives all downstream transmission paths.
notes.brent_crude_pct_change: Strong positive correlation with disruption duration. Oil price is the primary transmission channel.
notes.cny_usd_pct_change: Mild negative correlation - CNY weakens moderately under oil shock via trade balance pressure.
notes.sgd_usd_pct_change: Mild negative correlation - SGD is relatively stable given reserve adequacy.
notes.idr_usd_pct_change: Stronger negative correlation - IDR more vulnerable to commodity shock and current account pressure.
notes.ust_10yr_yield_change_bps: Positive correlation - oil shock drives inflation expectations and yield curve steepening.
notes.em_credit_spread_change_bps: Positive correlation - risk-off environment widens EM credit spreads significantly.
notes.asia_equity_pct_change: Negative correlation - equity markets sell off under combined oil, yield, and credit spread pressure.
